title: Sacred Heart Forane Church
tagline: Sacred Heart Forane Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sacred Heart Forane Church (Malayalam: സേക്രഡ് ഹാർട്ട് ഫൊറോന പള്ളി തിരുവമ്പാടി) is a Syro-Malabar Catholic Church situated in Thiruvambady, Kozhikode District, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Sacred Heart Forane Church (Malayalam: സേക്രഡ് ഹാർട്ട് ഫൊറോന പള്ളി തിരുവമ്പാടി) is a Syro-Malabar Catholic Church situated in Thiruvambady, Kozhikode District, Kerala, India. It is under Syro-Malabar Catholic Diocese of Thamarassery and Archdiocese of Thalassery. The Church was established in the year 1944. There are more than catholic 1000 families in this forane and about 5000 members, which is one of the largest parishes in the Diocese.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kattippara
topPlaces.description: Kattippara (Hard Rock in Malayalam) often called as Kattipara, is a Panchayat in Kozhikode district, Kerala. It is located about 10 km from Thamarassery town.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvambady
topPlaces.description: Thiruvambady is a major town in Kozhikode district in Kerala, India which lies near foothills of Wayanad. Thiruvambady Assembly constituency is a Legislative Assembly Constituency of Kerala, situated 35 kilometres (22 mi) from west of Kozhikode.

topPlaces.name: Mukkam
topPlaces.description: Mukkam is a major municipal town in the Kozhikode district, in the state of Kerala, India. It is located about 27 km east of Kozhikode city on the banks of the Iruvanjippuzha River, one of the major tributaries of the Chaliyar River.

topPlaces.name: Urumi 2 Weir
topPlaces.description: Urumi 2 Weir' is a small diversion dam constructed across Poyilingalpuzha in Thiruvambady village of Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. The weir is constructed across the Poyilingalpuzha river, downstream of Urumi I power house to divert water to Urumi II power house.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Maikavu
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Church is one of the old churches in Malabar Diocese of the Malankara Orthodox Church.

topPlaces.name: Maikave
topPlaces.description: Maikave is a village in the Kozhikode district of Northern Kerala (Malabar), on average 4.1m above sea level and near a river. It is located near Thamarassery (about 7 km away).

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Syriac Orthodox Church, Maikave
topPlaces.description: Vattal Kurisu Pally in Maikavu is one of Kerala's oldest Syriac Orthodox pilgrim centers. The patron saints of this parish are Saint George and Parumala Thirumeni.

image.alt: St. Mary's Syriac Orthodox Church, Maikave

topPlaces.name: Poovaranthode
topPlaces.description: Poovaranthode is a small village located in Kozhikode District of Kerala, India. As a hilltop village, it is one of the coolest places in the Malabar region.

items.note: Kattippara (Hard Rock in Malayalam) often called as Kattipara, is a Panchayat in Kozhikode district, Kerala. It is located about 10 km from Thamarassery town.

Thiruvambady is a major town in Kozhikode district in Kerala, India which lies near foothills of Wayanad. Thiruvambady Assembly constituency is a Legislative Assembly Constituency of Kerala, situated 35 kilometres (22 mi) from west of Kozhikode.

Mukkam is a major municipal town in the Kozhikode district, in the state of Kerala, India. It is located about 27 km east of Kozhikode city on the banks of the Iruvanjippuzha River, one of the major tributaries of the Chaliyar River.

Urumi 2 Weir' is a small diversion dam constructed across Poyilingalpuzha in Thiruvambady village of Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. The weir is constructed across the Poyilingalpuzha river, downstream of Urumi I power house to divert water to Urumi II power house.
St. Mary's Orthodox Church is one of the old churches in Malabar Diocese of the Malankara Orthodox Church.
Maikave is a village in the Kozhikode district of Northern Kerala (Malabar), on average 4.1m above sea level and near a river. It is located near Thamarassery (about 7 km away).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sacred Heart Forane Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sacred Heart Forane Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sacred Heart Forane Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sacred Heart Forane Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sacred Heart Forane Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sacred Heart Forane Church?
faq.a: Stays in Sacred Heart Forane Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sacred Heart Forane Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kattippara, Thiruvambady, Mukkam, Urumi 2 Weir, St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Maikavu.
